source_pr.title: plan, executor: check b.err after buildSort and buildLimit in builUnion
source_pr.body:
## What have you changed? (mandatory)
Before this commit, b.err is not checked after buildSort and buildLimit in buildUnion.


## What is the type of the changes? (mandatory)

- Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)

## How has this PR been tested? (mandatory)
integration test


## Does this PR affect documentation (docs/docs-cn) update? (mandatory)

no


## Does this PR need to be added to the release notes? (mandatory)
no

## Refer to a related PR or issue link (optional)

## Benchmark result if necessary (optional)

## Add a few positive/negative examples (optional)

symptoms: _, err = tk.Exec("prepare stmt from '(select * FROM t) union all (select * FROM t) order by a limit ?'") (executor/prepared_test.go)
failure_signature: _, err = tk.Exec("prepare stmt from '(select * FROM t) union all (select * FROM t) order by a limit ?'") (executor/prepared_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: _, err = tk.Exec("prepare stmt from '(select * FROM t) union all (select * FROM t) order by a limit ?'") (executor/prepared_test.go)
